verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: Enter the code sent to your email to confirm your account.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a reset code (if the account exists).

reset.successSubtitle: You can now sign in with your new password.

hero.title: Can't decide where to eat?
